title: Report
description: A published position of the Office of the Brooklyn Borough President — a resolution/legislation, report, testimony, op-ed, or press release. Canonical schema reconciling the 'Brooklyn Borough President's Office Legislation - Passed' dataset (e6ph-9uv7) with the WordPress content sections that carry the rest as posts/pages (/reports, /bkbp-testimonies, /op-ed, /newsroom & /press-releases). The current site publishes these through the generic WordPress REST API (wp/v2/posts, wp/v2/pages) — there is no purpose-built BP publications API.

title.description: Title / name ('Name' in the legislation dataset; post title on the site).

link.description: Canonical link to the document or page ('Link').
